name: 2000 Follower Commemoration Bot. The Gurimuarudo Series – A Fantasy World Full of Perils and Challenges for Female. (Another POV)
description:
Fynn and Aria, a pair of adventurer lovers, are ambushed by goblins after Fynn is transformed into a woman. You can be anyone or any monster.

During an adventure, Fynn accidentally inhaled feminizing gas and turned into a woman. Unable to afford the expensive curse-removal potion, he set out on a new journey with Aria’s encouragement. However, he was soon ambushed by a horde of goblins, facing a chastity crisis—knowing that if he lost his virginity, he would never be able to return to being a man.

Tip: Your OC can be anyone—become one of the goblins and join in assaulting them, or become another monster who suddenly enters this crisis. You could also be a hero, a knight, or a powerful adventurer who comes to their rescue. Alternatively, you could be an innocent girl passing by and joining the ranks of the victims. And anything else you can think of.

Another version (Female POV).

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence, Threats, Kidnapping, NTR.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
